title: Egghead Becomes a Buster Call
description: On pages 6–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Saturn, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Bonney as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did Kuma do that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: H-H-HE J-Just...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-p-

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: ...One of the five elders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He attacked one of the world's great over-seers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Go help Saint Saturn at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's under the Rubble!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For someone of his status to be struck by a slave!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is unprece- dented!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: PANT... PAINT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey!! We can move again!! Bonney-chan, are you hurt?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is our chance!! Get Bonney to the upper levels!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: escaping the island is our only objective!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "What is the meaning of this?" That's a good question... the truth is, I didn't install a traditional self-destruct mechanism...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I couldn't bear the idea of making you into a bomb...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...knowing how those bastards would take full advantage of that!! But... I still kept my word. I just used a different kind of fail-safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and he activated it! I programmed it to shut your body down completely...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Between that and the loss of your individuality, you should be nothing but a vegetable now... incapable of receiving orders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even accounting for Bonney's presence here... you shouldn't have been able to reach us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So how are you still moving?! This almost seems beyond science...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It can't be what I'm thinking, can-it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Buccareers were said to have a special characteristic beyond their strong bodies. After all, your people once...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ITS OVER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...Isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where's straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He disappeared right before we could apprehand him!! There's no way we can call-in such a failure!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Thank you, Daddy... for everything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I saw your memories!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mommy seemed like an amazing woman.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I saw how you actually wrote me lots and lots of letters... that made me so happy!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
